home.title: Digiskills portal
home.welcome: Welcome to the Digiskills app. Discover your digital skills level and get recommended courses.

assessment.title: Digital Assessment
assessment.subtitle: DigComp 2.1 · ~15 minutes
assessment.description: Test your digital competencies in 5 areas: information literacy, communication, content creation, security, and problem solving. Based on results you will get recommended courses.

companyReport.title: Company Assessment Report
companyReport.subtitle: For leadership · Aggregated results · Market benchmark
companyReport.description: Overview of company-wide digital competencies: Digiskills Index, market comparison, talent pipeline, strategic priorities and recommended company courses.

assessment.title: Digital Assessment
assessment.subtitle: DigComp 2.1 competency mapping · Choose how to complete
assessment.formOptionDesc: Go through steps from identification to submission.
assessment.chatbotOptionDesc: Answer questions in chat – type or speak.
assessment.voiceOptionDesc: Our AI voicebot Eliška will call you on the phone.
assessment.voiceCalling: Please wait, we are connecting you with AI Eliška.
assessment.voiceSuccess: Eliška is on the phone with you. Enjoy your conversation!
assessment.voiceError: Failed to initiate call. Please try again.

info.title: What Digiskills Assessment is and what it brings
info.lead: The assessment is a quick mapping of digital skills across DigComp 2.1 domains. It helps both people and companies understand strengths and where focused upskilling makes the biggest impact.
info.step1Desc: Complete short questions via form, chatbot, or AI phone call.
info.step2Desc: You get a clear picture of strengths and growth opportunities.
info.step3Desc: We suggest concrete learning paths for individuals and teams.
info.benefitsTitle: What you gain from the assessment
info.benefitsSubtitle: Clear outputs you can use immediately for people and company development.
info.benefit1Desc: See where you stand across key digital competency areas right away.
info.benefit2Desc: Results are shown in a simple format with market context.
info.benefit3Desc: Identify what to improve first for the highest practical impact.
info.benefit4Desc: The platform suggests courses based on your identified needs.
info.benchmarkDesc: Outputs connect to the company report and show not just scores, but also practical learning priorities.

assessment.noResults: Assessment results are not available. Please complete the assessment.
assessment.introDesc: Verify and complete your basic details.
assessment.digitalRelationship: Your overall relationship with digital technologies (1 = I avoid them, 10 = I'm a tech enthusiast)
assessment.aiBonusDesc: Optional section focused on AI knowledge and usage.
assessment.aiKnowledge: AI knowledge: How advanced do you consider yourself in using generative AI (e.g. writing prompts, generating text or images)?
assessment.aiTools: Which AI features in Microsoft do you know or use?
assessment.beforeSubmitDesc: After clicking Submit, the evaluation will be generated and the report displayed.

form.name: Name
form.enterTip: Tip: you can use Enter to continue quickly.

assessmentChatbot.intro: Hey, you can type or even speak – I'll handle it. Let's go – I have a few questions about your digital skills.
assessmentChatbot.placeholder: Type your answer or click the microphone...
assessmentChatbot.question1: How well do you search and evaluate information? You can give a number 1–10 or describe it in words.
assessmentChatbot.question2: How confident are you in digital collaboration? Teams, document sharing, online meetings – how does it work for you?
assessmentChatbot.question3: How do you handle content creation? Word, PowerPoint, automation – what do you use and how confident are you?
assessmentChatbot.question4: How confident are you in security? Phishing, passwords, MFA – do you pay attention to that?
assessmentChatbot.question5: How do you handle technical problems? Do you call IT or solve it yourself?
assessmentChatbot.question6: How do you use AI at work? Copilot, Dictation, or still mostly experimenting?
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer1: Pretty well, I handle filters and search, about 7 out of 10.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer2: I use Teams and Outlook daily, document sharing is routine for me. 8.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer3: I master Word and PowerPoint, could be better with automation – 6.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer4: I watch out for phishing, MFA is on. I feel pretty confident, 7.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer5: I look up instructions, usually solve it myself. I only call IT when it's really complex – 8.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer6: I occasionally try Copilot, use Dictation. Still mostly experimenting – 6.

onedriveReadonly.instruction: Share a document in OneDrive with **read-only** permissions (Can view). Open the share dialog, set the permission to "View only" and send me a screenshot of the settings.

visualTask.uploadHint: Click or drag a screenshot here
visualTask.demoFeedback: Thanks, I've noted the result. You had it almost right – 7/10.

assessmentSummary.aiFeedback1: You have a solid foundation. Focus on exploring new tools and don't be afraid to experiment – every step forward counts.
assessmentSummary.aiFeedback2: You handle technology with confidence. If you focus on automation and AI tools, you'll gain hours of time each week.
assessmentSummary.aiFeedback3: You're above average. Your knowledge allows you to mentor colleagues and actively contribute to digital transformation.
assessmentSummary.aiFeedback4: Congratulations! You're among digital leaders. Your expertise can shape the digital strategy of the entire organization.
assessmentSummary.congratsText1: Based on your answers, you have been assigned to the level
assessmentSummary.congratsText2Suffix: shows that you move in the digital environment with a high degree of confidence and efficiency.
assessmentSummary.congratsText3End: significantly exceeds the company and market average, making you an ideal mentor for your team.
assessmentSummary.congratsText4: For your further professional growth, we see the greatest potential in
assessmentSummary.congratsText4Suffix: By focusing on modern formats and advanced visualization tools, you can take your existing knowledge to a strategic level and further streamline your daily agenda.
assessmentSummary.superpowersDesc: In this area you are above the company average. Your score
assessmentSummary.superpowersDescSuffix: shows you have a solid foundation for mentoring colleagues.
assessmentSummary.growthSpaceDesc: This is where you have the greatest potential to improve. Current score
assessmentSummary.growthSpaceDescSuffix: – with targeted courses you will move forward quickly.
assessmentSummary.appsToDevelopDesc: Based on your answers, we have identified tools where you have room for improvement:
assessmentSummary.noOtherCourses: No other courses to choose from
assessmentSummary.readyToMoveDesc: Your results have been saved. The courses are waiting for you.

courseCreation.title: Course creation
courseCreation.subtitle: Choose how to create. For a quick start we recommend AI-assisted creation.
courseCreation.aiCreationDesc: Just describe your goals, upload materials and AI will design the course for you.
courseCreation.manualCreationDesc: Create the course step by step yourself.
courseCreation.benefit1Desc: Instead of lengthy syllabus building, you'll be ready in minutes. AI suggests the structure and you just refine the details.
courseCreation.benefit2Desc: The course is divided into shorter, digestible blocks. People learn progressively and can fit it alongside work.
courseCreation.benefit3Desc: Just describe the topic and goals. AI creates a logical outline and divides content into lessons.
courseCreation.benefit4Desc: The resulting course looks modern and clear. No need to worry about design or formatting.
courseCreation.step1Title: Describe what you want to teach
courseCreation.step1Desc: Enter the course topic, target audience and main goals. AI needs to know where you're heading.
courseCreation.step2Desc: Add PDF, Word or PowerPoint files. AI will extract key information from them.
courseCreation.step3Desc: Within minutes you have a complete course structure with lessons you can further customize.
courseCreation.example1Desc: Complete guide for newcomers – from company culture to practical procedures.
courseCreation.example2Desc: Occupational safety and fire protection in line with current legislation.
courseCreation.example3Desc: Detailed product knowledge for sales team and customer support.
courseCreation.faq1Q: How long does course creation take?
courseCreation.faq1A: Usually 10–20 minutes. It depends on the scope of materials and topic complexity. AI works fast, you just refine the course.
courseCreation.faq2Q: Can I edit the course later?
courseCreation.faq2A: Yes, anytime. You can add lessons, change texts, insert images or videos. The course is fully in your hands.
courseCreation.faq3Q: What material formats can I upload?
courseCreation.faq3A: PDF, Word (.docx), PowerPoint (.pptx) and text files. AI extracts content and creates the structure.
courseCreation.faq4Q: Is the course content mine only?
courseCreation.faq4A: Yes, all content remains your property. We don't share it with anyone else and don't use it for AI training.
courseCreation.manualCreationDesc: Standard manual course creation in our editor.
courseCreation.whatYouGet: What you get with AI creation
courseCreation.whatYouGetDesc: Stop spending hours creating content. AI will help you create a professional course quickly and efficiently.
courseCreation.bullet1: Time savings – course in minutes instead of days
courseCreation.createInMinutesDesc: Upload your materials, describe your goals and let AI create a structured course. Save hours of work.

digiskillsCreate.botQ1: Hi! Let's create a tailored course. What will your new course be about? (e.g. computer, browser, phone work…)
digiskillsCreate.botQ2: Great! Who is the course for?
digiskillsCreate.botQ3: What should participants take away? What skills or knowledge?
digiskillsCreate.botQ4: How long should the course be?
digiskillsCreate.botQ5: Upload your know-how (PDF, documents…) and I'll create the outline from them.
digiskillsCreate.audienceBeginner: Beginners – I use computer/phone daily, want to get more out of it
digiskillsCreate.generating1: Reading uploaded materials and finding connections…
digiskillsCreate.generating3: Splitting content into videos, articles and tasks…
digiskillsCreate.generating4: Building the outline – computer, browser, phone…
digiskillsCreate.introDefault: The course will guide you from basics to advanced techniques.

statsChatbot.intro: Hi! 👋 I'm your AI assistant for company statistics. I can help you analyze data, identify trends and suggest improvements. What would you like to ask?
statsChatbot.suggestedQ1: How do we compare to other companies?
statsChatbot.suggestedQ2: Where should we focus and what do you recommend?
statsChatbot.suggestedQ3: What's the study trend over the last month?
statsChatbot.predefinedAnswer1:
Great question! Based on the data, your company is **above market average**.

**Key indicators:**
- Your Digiskills Index: **6.8 / 10** (market average is 5.2)
- You rank among the **top 30%** of companies in the Czech Republic
- Employee activity is **31% higher** than average

**Strengths vs. competition:**
- Cybersecurity (+23% above average)
- MS Teams & Collaboration (+18% above average)

Congratulations! You're on the right track. 🎯
statsChatbot.predefinedAnswer2:
Based on analysis of your data, I recommend focusing on these areas:

**Biggest gaps:**
1. **AI & Automation** (31% knowledge) - This is a critical area for future competitiveness
2. **Power BI & Visualization** (28%) - Data-driven decision making is key
3. **Cloud Computing** (24%) - Foundations for modern IT infrastructure

**Concrete recommendations:**
- Assign "AI for Everyone" course to all employees
- Schedule Power BI workshop for managers
- Consider a motivation program for course completion

**Action plan:**
I would create a learning path starting with AI courses (highest priority) and gradually add Power BI. Expected Digiskills Index increase: +1.2 points in 3 months.
statsChatbot.predefinedAnswer3:
I analyzed activity over the last 30 days:

**Overall trend: 📈 Growing (+24%)**

**Weekly overview:**
- Week 1: 156 lessons
- Week 2: 189 lessons (+21%)
- Week 3: 234 lessons (+24%)
- Week 4: 198 lessons (-15%, weekend drop)
- Week 5: 267 lessons (+35%) ⭐ Record!

**What works:**
- Most studying on Tuesday and Wednesday (9:00-11:00)
- AI courses have highest engagement
- Gamification (points and rankings) motivates

**Warning:**
- 26 employees were inactive for more than 2 weeks
- I recommend sending them a reminder
statsChatbot.predefinedAnswer4:
I identified employees who may need support:

**Inactive for more than 14 days (26 people):**
- Most from: Production (12), Logistics (8)
- Recommendation: Personal contact + offer of offline training

**Low course completion (18 people):**
- Started more than 3 courses, completed less than 30%
- Possible causes: Lack of time, inappropriate difficulty
- Recommendation: Shorter microlearning formats

**Potential leaders (5 people):**
- Marie Nováková, Petr Svoboda, Eva Horáková...
- High activity, can help motivate others
- Recommendation: Engage as mentors

Would you like me to prepare a concrete action plan?
statsChatbot.defaultAnswer:
Thanks for your question! Analyzing data...

Based on your company statistics I see that:
- You have **98 active employees** out of 124
- Average Digiskills Index is **6.8 / 10**
- Last month you completed **47 courses**

You can ask more specifically, for example:
- "How do we compare to other companies?"
- "Where should we focus?"
- "What's the study trend?"

statsApi.title: API connection & Data export
statsApi.subtitle: Export statistics to your own systems
statsApi.description: Connect Digiskills statistics with your internal systems. Using REST API you can get real-time employee learning data and visualize it in Power BI, Tableau or custom dashboards.
statsApi.powerBiDesc: Download a template with pre-built visualizations for quick deployment.
statsApi.apiKeyDesc: Generate an API key for access to your statistics.

communicationSettings.title: Communication & Notifications
communicationSettings.subtitle: Set how and when AI Mentor will contact you
communicationSettings.quizDesc: AI sends quizzes and tests you.
communicationSettings.frequencyInfo: We know this reduces study reach by 10%.
communicationSettings.offWarning: We don't recommend turning off notifications. Your manager will see this.
communicationSettings.companySubtitle: Global rules for the entire organization
communicationSettings.mandatoryYes: Employees cannot turn off AI Mentor notifications.
communicationSettings.minWeekly: Employees must receive messages at least once a week.
communicationSettings.minBiweekly: Employees can set frequency down to once every 14 days.
communicationSettings.infoBox: These settings affect all employees in your organization. Changes take effect immediately.

companyStats.title: Company study statistics
companyStats.subtitle: Your company studies 31% more than the market average. Employees completed 47 courses this month.
companyStats.comment1: Employee engagement is strong: 98 out of 124 people are actively studying, which is approximately 79% of the company. It is advisable to specifically support the remaining teams to get engagement above 85%.
companyStats.comment2: Company performance is above market: Digiskills Index 6.8 is significantly above the market average of 5.2. There is still room to reach the top 10% of companies (8.4), but the trend confirms a very good starting position.
companyStats.comment3: AI and M365 topics are driving the most interest: among the most requested courses, "AI Prompting for Practice" and "ChatGPT in the Office" lead, and Excel and Teams videos also have high viewership. This is a good basis for further internal communication and content planning.
companyStats.comment4: Study results are stable: a total of 312 courses have been completed, with strong performance especially for "Teams & Collaboration" (94/124) and "Cybersecurity Basics" (89/124). For further growth, it makes sense to strengthen support for data topics where completion is still lower.
companyStats.popularCoursesSub: Courses with the highest number of active students
companyStats.popularVideosSub: Microlearning videos with the highest number of views
companyStats.courseOverviewSub: Completion rate of individual courses across all employees

profile.continueText: Continue developing your digital competencies. You're off to a great start this week – keep going.
profile.belowMinimumWarning: Warning: your results are below your company's minimum.

firma.overviewSubtitle: Track assessment completion progress across your organization
firma.bulkReminderTitle: Bulk reminder to complete assessment by email
firma.evaluateDesc: Once sufficient participation is reached, proceed to company evaluation.
firma.evaluationDialogText: Do you want to proceed with company-wide evaluation?
firma.sendDialogTitle: Send email to {count} people who haven't completed the assessment
firma.sendDialogConfirm: Do you really want to send a reminder to these employees?
firma.evaluatingCompany: Evaluating results for the entire company…
firma.initialEmailBody:
Subject: Reminder to complete Digiskills assessment

Hello,

please complete the Digiskills assessment. Your responses will help us evaluate the current level of digital skills in the company and prepare targeted training recommendations.

Assessment link: https://digiskills.example.com/assessment

Thank you for your cooperation.

companyReport.course1Desc: Simplify routine tasks and save hours of work per week.
companyReport.course2Title: Basics of working with AI tools
companyReport.course2Desc: Discover how Copilot and other AI tools can help you be more productive.
companyReport.course3Desc: Protect data, recognize threats and work safely online.
companyReport.course4Desc: Work with spreadsheets, charts and formulas effectively and clearly.
companyReport.course5Desc: Learn advanced techniques for team communication and online meetings.
companyReport.evaluationSummary1: {name} {achieved} an overall Digiskills Index of {index} in the assessment period, which is {compared} the market average ({marketAvg}). With {count} {participants}, this provides a solid foundation for targeted development of digital competencies.
companyReport.evaluationSummary2: The strongest area is {superpower} (score {score}). Conversely, the greatest room for growth is {growthArea} ({growthScore}), where {entity} lags behind the market average ({marketAvg}).
companyReport.evaluationSummary3: We recommend focusing training investments on courses supporting areas with the greatest growth potential – in line with priorities employees themselves indicated in the assessment. Below you will find courses recommended for {target}.
companyReport.talentPipelineDesc: Distribution of employee digital competencies on scale 1–10
companyReport.strategicPrioritiesDesc: What employees want to improve – respondent voting
companyReport.aiQaDesc: Ask a question about your company results and get guidance on where you can create the biggest improvement.
companyReport.aiQuestionDefault: What can we do as a company to improve our index by 1 point?
companyReport.aiQaThinkingText: AI is analyzing assessment results and preparing recommendations...
companyReport.aiQaAnswerText:
The biggest +1 point shift will come from focusing on two areas: integrating AI into everyday work and improving digital content creation.

In the first wave, we recommend completing “Basics of working with AI tools” and “Automation with Power Automate” to quickly increase productivity across teams. In the second wave, continue with “Excel and data analysis” and “Effective collaboration in Microsoft Teams” so the improvement is reflected in decision-making, knowledge sharing, and team coordination.
companyReport.strategicCourseSelection: Strategic course selection for the whole company
companyReport.strategicCourseDesc: Based on the assessment, we recommend these training priorities
companyReport.assignCoursesDesc: Assign courses to employees and track their progress in real time.
companyReport.superpowerDescAll: The company is above market average in this area. A score of 6.5 shows that employees have a solid foundation in data protection and cybersecurity. The internal security culture is healthy.
companyReport.superpowerDescIt: The IT department excels in security. A score of 8.2 is well above both company and market average. The team actively implements security standards and serves as a model for others.
companyReport.superpowerDescMarketing: Marketing excels in content creation. A score of 7.2 is well above the company average. The team effectively uses tools for creating and managing digital content.
companyReport.superpowerDescFinance: Finance excels in data work. A score of 7.1 reflects strong analytical skills and advanced Excel knowledge. The department efficiently processes large volumes of data.
companyReport.superpowerDescSales: The sales team excels in communication. A score of 7.4 reflects strong presentation skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with clients and internal teams.
companyReport.superpowerDescHr: The HR department has good communication skills. A score of 6.2 reflects the ability to communicate effectively across the company and coordinate HR processes.
companyReport.growthDescAll: This is where the company has the greatest potential to improve. The current score of 4.4 lags significantly behind the market average (5.9). Targeted courses in this area will deliver the highest ROI on training investments.
companyReport.growthDescIt: Despite technical proficiency, the department has room for improvement in soft skills. We recommend courses focused on effective communication with non-technical colleagues.
companyReport.growthDescMarketing: The department could benefit from courses focused on analytical thinking and technical problem solving. We recommend training in data analysis.
companyReport.growthDescFinance: The department has significant room for improvement in digital presentation and visualization. We recommend Power BI and advanced data visualization courses.
companyReport.growthDescSales: The department could benefit from courses focused on creating professional presentations and proposals. We recommend training in design tools.
companyReport.growthDescHr: The department could benefit from courses focused on analytical thinking and using data for HR decisions. We recommend training in HR analytics.

admin.noCoursesToReplace: No other courses to choose from.

creator.title: Digiskills Creator
creator.subtitle: Manage your courses, track sales and create new content for the marketplace
creator.salesDesc: Overview of sales and commissions from your courses on the marketplace
creator.salesTableDesc: Commission breakdown by course is available in the detail view. Current commission rate: 50% of course price.
creator.createNewDesc: A course created with AI will go to the Digiskills marketplace and be available to other users.
creator.heroSubtitle: Manage your courses, track sales and create new content with AI.
creator.benefit1Title: From idea to content in no time
creator.benefit1Desc: Instead of spending hours assembling a syllabus, you'll be ready in minutes. AI suggests the structure and you just refine the details.
creator.benefit2Desc: The course is divided into shorter, digestible blocks. People learn in stages and can fit it in alongside work.
creator.benefit3Desc: Just describe the topic and goals. Artificial intelligence creates a logical outline and divides the content into lessons.
creator.benefit4Desc: The resulting course looks modern and clear. No need to worry about design or formatting.
creator.tip1Desc: The ideal lesson length is 5–10 minutes. Shorter content has higher completion rates.
creator.tip2Desc: Show real-world usage. Theory without practice is quickly forgotten.
creator.tip3Desc: Add quizzes at the end of lessons. You'll verify understanding and increase engagement.

dashboard.continueStudyDesc: You have a course in progress – pick up where you left off
dashboard.recommendedDesc: Based on your assessment, we recommend these courses to develop your digital competencies.
dashboard.mandatoryDesc: These courses were assigned to you by your manager based on company needs.
dashboard.completedSubtitle: Great job! You have successfully finished these courses.
dashboard.progressText: You've completed {completed} out of {total} courses. Keep going!

courseDetail.tipText: When you get stuck while studying, take a minute break. A short breather often opens new solutions. Need help? Use the chat in the bottom right.

activityContent.activity1Desc: Development is constantly moving forward, and with new tools you can work faster and smarter. In this video we'll look at how technology is changing and how to keep up. You'll find that adapting to new tools isn't as difficult as it may seem.
activityContent.activity2Desc: Technology as a good servant but a bad master. Learn how to maintain a healthy relationship with digital tools and use them effectively without becoming their slave. Digital mindset is about balance between using technology and preserving a human approach.

goalChatbot.title: Define your goal
goalChatbot.intro: Hi! I'll help you define your path to digital heroism. Together we'll set a clear goal that will motivate you. Answer a few questions – you have pre-filled answers ready, just press Enter.
goalChatbot.q1: In which area do you most want to improve your digital skills? (e.g., productivity, communication, security, AI tools)
goalChatbot.q2: How much time per week do you want to dedicate to learning and development?
goalChatbot.q3: What is your biggest challenge when working with technology?
goalChatbot.q4: What is your preferred learning style?
goalChatbot.q5: What specific goal do you want to achieve in the next 30 days?
goalChatbot.a1: I want to improve in productivity and using AI tools.
goalChatbot.a2: About 1 hour per week, ideally split into shorter blocks.
goalChatbot.a3: Sometimes I get lost in the number of apps and don't know which one to use.
goalChatbot.a4: I prefer videos and practical examples that I can try right away.
goalChatbot.a5: I want to learn to effectively use Copilot for everyday work.
goalChatbot.complete: Great! Your goal is set. Below you can see an overview of what you want to achieve. Now just get started!
goalChatbot.placeholder: Type your answer or use the pre-filled one...
goalChatbot.hint: Tip: Press Enter to send the pre-filled answer

reflexeChatbot.title: Reflection on your leadership style
reflexeChatbot.intro: Hi! I'll help you reflect on your leadership style and empathy. Answer a few questions – you have pre-filled answers ready, just press Enter.
reflexeChatbot.q1: How would you describe your current leadership style? (e.g., directive, participative, coaching)
reflexeChatbot.q2: How do you rate your ability to show empathy in work situations? What do you do well and what would you like to improve?
reflexeChatbot.q3: Recall a situation from practice where empathy played an important role. What happened and how did you respond?
reflexeChatbot.q4: What specifically do you want to improve in empathetic leadership in the coming weeks?
reflexeChatbot.a1: My style is rather participative – I like to listen to the team's opinions and involve them in decision-making.
reflexeChatbot.a2: Empathy comes naturally in personal conversations, but in stressful situations I sometimes react too quickly.
reflexeChatbot.a3: A colleague was going through a difficult period – instead of focusing on tasks, I gave them space to talk and it helped.
reflexeChatbot.a4: I want to learn to better recognize others' emotions and respond to them appropriately.
reflexeChatbot.complete: Great! Your reflection has been recorded. Below you can see a summary – you can return to it anytime.
reflexeChatbot.placeholder: Type your answer or use the pre-filled one...
reflexeChatbot.hint: Tip: Press Enter to send the pre-filled answer

anglictinaReflexeChatbot.title: Reflection on language goals
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.intro: Hi! I'll help you reflect on your English learning goals. Answer a few questions – you have pre-filled answers ready, just press Enter.
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.q1: Why are you learning English? Where do you need it most (work, travel, hobbies)?
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.q2: How would you rate your current level? What are you better at and what is harder?
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.q3: How much time per week can you dedicate to English? What learning style suits you?
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.q4: What specific goal do you want to achieve in the next 3 months?
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.a1: I need English mainly for work – emails, meetings, presentations.
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.a2: I understand well, but speaking and writing are harder for me than reading and listening.
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.a3: About 3 hours per week, I prefer videos and interactive exercises.
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.a4: I want to be able to give a presentation in English without preparation.
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.complete: Great! Your reflection has been recorded. Below you can see a summary – you can return to it anytime.
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.placeholder: Type your answer or use the pre-filled one...
anglictinaReflexeChatbot.hint: Tip: Press Enter to send the pre-filled answer
